name: PSY-Framegear Delta
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＰＳＹ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サイ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>フレームギア・<ruby lang="jp"><rb>δ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>デルタ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned by a card effect. When your opponent activates a Spell Card while you control no monsters (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon both this card from your hand and 1 "PSY-Frame Driver" from your hand, Deck, or GY, and if you do, negate that activation, and if you do that, destroy that Spell. During the End Phase, banish the face-up monsters Special Summoned by this effect.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned by a card effect. When your opponent activates a Spell Card while you control no monsters (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon both this card from your hand and 1 "PSY-Frame Driver" from your hand, Deck, or GY, and if you do, negate that activation, and if you do that, destroy that Spell. During the End Phase, banish the face-up monsters Special Summoned by this effect.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned by a card effect. When your opponent activates a Spell Card while you control no monsters (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon both this card from your hand and 1 "PSY-Frame Driver" from your hand, Deck, or GY, and if you do, negate that activation, and if you do that, destroy that Spell. During the End Phase, banish the face-up monsters Special Summoned by this effect.

mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
summoning: Must be Special Summoned by a card effect
Special Summons itself from your hand
